name: Hangtown-Fry Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the oysters with salt and pepper.
2. Dip each oyster into the beaten eggs and then roll in cracker crumbs.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons of melted butter in a pan over medium heat.
4. Cook the oysters for about 1 or 2 minutes on one side, until set.
5. Flip and cook for an additional minute on the other side.
6. Melt another tablespoon of butter in the same pan.
7. Pour in enough beaten eggs to cover the bottom of the pan.
8. As soon as the egg base begins to set, add 4 oysters into the center of the omelet.
9. Roll up the omelet with the oysters inside once the omelet is nearly set.
10. Remove from heat and keep warm.
11. Repeat steps 3-10 for the remaining ingredients.
12. Garnish with bacon strips and serve hot.
Makes 4 omelets.
